events.description: User rejected task-050/051 as superficial — too many surface scans, ~15% false-positive rate. This task is the do-over for AI subsystem only: deft-review agent invoked with explicit 'no Grep snippets, full Read' instruction; 18 files read in full, 6 end-to-end data flows traced, 10 verified findings produced (vs. 25+ noisy ones from the surface scan), plus 5 architectural smells, 9 confirmations of recent fixes, explicit out-of-scope list. F-1 is a regression I introduced this session: the 50/50 crystal floor silently neutralizes Rush's SetCrystalTarget(1).
